items.question: Why can't I chat or join VCs?
answer: If you have no access to the channels or you are unverified, make sure to get the required roles in Channels & Roles and complete verification in verify-here.

items.question: Where is the general chat?
answer: You can chat in lobby.
You can also chat with other study buddies in the linked chat in each voice channel.
There is also a hallway for those in social rooms, which is viewable only if you are in default mode.

items.question: Why are channels muted?
answer: Voice channels are muted to simulate silent study rooms and minimize distractions.
If you prefer talking, use the Voice Study Rooms or Custom Study Rooms.

items.question: Is this server for Filipinos only? What is ARAL?
answer: No. While the server was created by a Filipino and initially catered to fellow Filipino study buddies, it has grown into a more diverse community.
Most members are still Filipino, but everyone is welcome.
ARAL means study.

items.question: I chose study mode. How can I switch to default mode to see all the channels?
answer: You can switch modes anytime in study-mode or in Channels & Roles.

items.question: How do I modify my roles?
answer: You can change your optional roles in Channels & Roles.
For academic roles, use enrollment for Filipinos or foreigners.
For Filipinos who want to select a graduate program, choose the post-graduate or alumni role first.

items.question: Where can I find study buddies?
answer: You can find study buddies in study-buddies.
You can also join any unlocked voice channel to study with others.
For homework-help, remember that the server is not a tutoring service. Guidance, explanations, and validation are allowed, but direct answers to quizzes, modules, or exams are not.

items.question: I want to connect with people with the same program as me. Where are the channels?
answer: Choose your academic levels and programs in enrollment.
Specific academic channels are available depending on your academic roles.

items.question: Where do I get personality or color roles? How do I get my MBTI tag?
answer: You can choose optional roles in Channels & Roles.
Certain rank roles have animated vibrant gradient colors.
MBTI tags, gemstones, and zodiac signs can be bought using study cookies in mimu.
Flower roles are exclusive to server boosters.

items.question: Where can I send surveys, questionnaires, or PSAs?
answer: Use bulletin-board for surveys, PSAs, and forms.

items.question: How do the Pomodoro channels work?
answer: The pomodoro system helps members study in focused intervals alongside other buddies. There are three dedicated Pomodoro voice channels, each with its own synced timer.
Members only see a Pomodoro timer after joining its matching voice channel.
Members can still interact with the timer even though the interface is read-only.
If a member fails to mark their presence for three consecutive pomodoro sessions, they will be removed from the pomodoro channel.
Use pomodoro-tasks to log tasks while in any Pomodoro room.

items.question: How do I gain role ranks or badges?
answer: Read about role ranks in the SWM Rank Roles guide.
highlights: Class Levels I to V are permanent and based on message and voice XP.
Voice Ranks from Newbie to Mythic reset every 6 months and are based on voice XP.
Top Study Buddies reset weekly and are based on voice XP.
Best Buddy resets every 12 hours and is based on voting.

items.question: Do you host events?
answer: Yes, SWM has hosted events in the past.
There are no events at the moment, but members can check event-reminders for updates.

items.question: How can I reach out to the mods for a private concern?
answer: Open a ticket at deans-office.

items.question: How can the Study With Me Discord Server help me?
answer: It can help members stay motivated by studying alongside other people.
It reduces isolation by making studying feel more communal.
It helps members build productive habits and structure their routines.
It creates opportunities to ask questions, share knowledge, and connect with others across time zones.
